arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou calls for transfer help for one of his Tottenham stars and hits out at critics
arts.sum: Spurs make their way to the Emirates Stadium to face Arsenal on Wednesday night in the latest north London derby and despite criticism over the team's defending this season - albeit with a makeshift backline for much of it - Tottenham will enter the match having conceded fewer goals away from home - nine - than any other side in the Premier League. "It’s a different challenge but it’s more to do with mindset in that he’s prepared to embrace that challenge, and the challenge we found in the last game when we found out just how strong they are on offensive set pieces and the players they’ve got in terms of both delivery and execution," said Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Star refuses to play after Tottenham's FA Cup trip to Tamworth after being 'disappointed' with club's response to racist abuse following game
arts.sum: The star hit out at the club over a 'lack of support' after receiving a threatening message in which he was called a 'n*****' and a 'monkey'. He has refusd to play in his club's midweek fixture.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injuries: Every player out of north London Derby
arts.sum: The latest Arsenal injury news ahead of Wednesday's north London Derby against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Out-of-contract Gunners man 'attracting concrete interest' from Brazilian giants
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Jorginho is reportedly on the radar of Brazilian club Flamengo, with his contract set to expire in the summer.

arts.ttl: Bayindir shines as 10-man Man Utd beat Arsenal in Cup thriller
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir shines as a 10-man Manchester United beat Arsenal on penalties in an FA Cup thriller at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Former Arsenal and Chelsea star Willian attracting interest from Premier League clubs after terminating his contract with Olympiacos
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Former Arsenal and Chelsea winger Willian could be set for a sensational return to the Premier League . The 36-year-old's last stint in the English top flight came at Fulham .

arts.ttl: Tempers flare after Arsenal awarded controversial penalty
arts.sum: Watch as Manchester United and Arsenal players need to be physically restrained after disputing the award of a penalty for a foul on Kai Havertz.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could make late move to steal Kolo Muani in yet another twist in saga – report
arts.sum: There is a surprise twist in the Randal Kolo Muani saga with Arsenal reportedly entering the race to sign him. The PSG star has been linked with a move away this month with several clubs interested in signing him. Among the clubs strongly linked with him are Tottenham, Juventus and Manchester United. It was reported […] The post Arsenal could make late move to steal Kolo Muani in yet another twist in saga – report appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Papers: Arsenal to reject Kolo Muani and Coman as neither 'good value'
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Wednesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Confident Kinsky earns trust of his Spurs teammates … and Postecoglou
arts.sum: The 21-year-old has kept two clean sheets in a row Spurs manager calls abuse at Tamworth ‘detestable’ Antonin Kinsky has bred confidence in his new Tottenham teammates and liberated them, according to the manager, Ange Postecoglou, who is ready to pitch him into another huge challenge on Wednesday night – the north London derby at Arsenal. It has been a whirlwind period for the 21-year-old goalkeeper since his arrival from Slavia Prague on the Sunday before last; the £12.5m fee made it one of the most expensive transfers from the Czech league.
